events.name: alien_signal
events.description: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.

events.name: ice_volcano
events.description: Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.

events.name: solar_flare
events.description: Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

governance.rationale: Return to self-governance. No rulers, no masters.

meta_awareness.insight: Reed Shore whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'
Spark Dune wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.
Drift Sand dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Strange crystalline structures found in deep drill core.
The worst dust storm in decades buries the southern airlock.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Electronics damaged by electromagnetic pulse from solar event.
Regolith dust causes chronic respiratory inflammation.
Subsurface water table detected by ground-penetrating radar.
Double shadow: Phobos and Deimos transit simultaneously.
Unknown pathogen spreads through the water system.
